# 高雄 (Kaohsiung) ### KHH · v0.3.0 Part of the [Taiwan Map Pack](https://ahkimn.github.io/subwaybuilder-tw-maps). ## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, each carrying a per-building foundation depth in in-game meters. Depths scale with building height and footprint width and are bounded to the **−10 m** to **−80 m** range: single-family homes and low-rise structures anchor at the floor, while supertall towers with deep bedrock piles (Taipei-101 class) reach the cap. Freestanding towers, masts, chimneys, and other slender non-occupiable structures are detected by shape and floored to the **−10 m** minimum. Foundation depths drive underground tunnel-clearance collision and are also emitted as a visual `foundations` pmtiles layer visible on the in-game map. Buildings come from NLSC LoD1 (_內政部國土測繪中心 3D 精緻建物模型_), which carries surveyed per-building height and floor count for the entire island. - **Water Depth Index** — A water depth index restricts track placement in inland water bodies (rivers, lakes, reservoirs) using a flat **−5 m** index that prevents surface-level track placement. _Coastal bathymetry (Taiwan Strait + Pacific) is scheduled for a future v2 update once an offshore depth source is registered._ - **Neighborhood Labels** — Three layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Special municipalities (直轄市) and provincial cities (省轄市) at the metropolitan scale (e.g. 臺北市 / Taipei). - _District labels_ — Names of all districts and townships (區 / 鄉 / 鎮 / 縣轄市) within the map boundary. - _Neighborhood labels_ — Village-level names (里) from the MOI 村里界圖 (Village & Borough Boundary) dataset published by the National Land Surveying and Mapping Center. ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Taiwanese government census and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _里_ (village/borough) using population-weighted centroids derived from the NLSC 國土利用調查 (National Land Use Inventory) Level-2 raster (~10 m grid) combined with a 100 m residential-mesh density signal — a Non-Negative Least-Squares (NNLS) calibration against DGBAS 2020 Population & Housing Census employed-resident counts disaggregates the raster floor area into per-村里 candidate weights. **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving DGBAS 2020 Population & Housing Census (主計總處人口及住宅普查) per-village workplace × residence ground truth. **Aggregation:** A per-county Option A scaling factor reconciles the universe mismatch between the 2021 工商業普查 (Industry & Services Census) workplace persons-engaged count and the 2020 Population & Housing Census all-employed universe (including agriculture + public-sector). Agriculture employment is dropped at the township grain using the DGBAS census employment-status breakdown to avoid placing rural-residence farmers in workplace buildings. **Commute Assignment:** Commute flows are assigned using a gravity model with distance-decay, calibrated against per-county and per-township workplace × residence O/D matrices published by DGBAS for the 2020 census. A cordon-snap pass injects out-of-bundle commute mass from neighbouring counties as anchored sinks at TW county centroids; a Generalized IPF (GIPF) pass then pins each township's self-loop share to the per-township census ground truth. **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, universities, hospitals, passenger-ferry terminals, cultural / sport / tourism attractions — are injected as an additive layer. Military-installation demand remains a future expansion item pending public garrison data. **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Taiwanese government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. ### Census & Demographics - **2020 Population & Housing Census** (主計總處人口及住宅普查 — per-township employment status by industry, per-county industry breakdown, per-village workplace × residence cross-tabulation) — [DGBAS](https://www.stat.gov.tw/) - **2020 Census Commute O/D** (per-county and per-township workplace × residence O/D matrices) — [DGBAS](https://www.stat.gov.tw/) - **2021 Industry & Services Census** (110年工商業普查 — per-township workplace persons-engaged with industry classification and officer/worker split) — [DGBAS](https://www.stat.gov.tw/) - **Monthly Village Population** (內政部戶政司村里人口統計 — per-里 household-register stock) — [MOI Department of Household Registration](https://www.ris.gov.tw/) ### Geospatial Reference - **National Land Use Inventory** (內政部國土利用調查 NLUI — Level-2 land-use classification raster, ~10 m grid) — [MOI NLSC](https://maps.nlsc.gov.tw/) - **NLSC LoD1 Buildings** (內政部國土測繪中心 3D 精緻建物模型 — per-building footprint with surveyed height and floor count, island-wide) — [NLSC 3D Maps](https://3dmaps.nlsc.gov.tw/) - **Administrative Boundaries** (內政部村里界圖 VILLAGE_NLSC — village/borough polygons with county/township/village keys) — [MOI NLSC](https://data.moi.gov.tw/MoiOD/) - **DGBAS Minimum Statistical Areas** (最小統計區 — sub-里 census polygons with household-register population field) — [DGBAS](https://www.stat.gov.tw/) ### Special Demand Statistics - **Airport Passenger Statistics** (民用航空局 — terminal-level annual passengers across international and domestic airports) — [CAA Taiwan](https://www.caa.gov.tw/) - **University Enrollment** (教育部 — per-school daytime enrollment by degree level for the latest academic year) — [MOE Statistics](https://stats.moe.gov.tw/) - **University Registry** (教育部 — institutional metadata: name, address, county, system classification) — [MOE Statistics](https://stats.moe.gov.tw/) - **Tourism Visitor Counts** (交通部觀光署 — annual visitor totals at major scenic, cultural, religious, and sport / recreation sites; methodology-filtered to facility-anchored counting per the 9-method spec) — [Tourism Administration data.gov.tw/dataset/8116](https://data.gov.tw/dataset/8116) + [Attraction Registry V2.1](https://data.gov.tw/dataset/7777). Methodology cross-check against [data.tainan.gov.tw 觀光遊憩月報](https://data.tainan.gov.tw/) per-county 備註 column. - **Hospital Registry & County Statistics** (健保署 全民健康保險特約醫事服務機構 facility register for hospital names / addresses / ownership; MOHW 醫事機構服務量各縣市統計表 per-county outpatient + inpatient volume, disaggregated to township grain by NLUI health-building floor area) — [NHI Open Data](https://data.nhi.gov.tw/) · [MOHW Statistics](https://dep.mohw.gov.tw/dos/np-1714-113.html) - **Port & Ferry Passenger Statistics** (TIPC 臺灣港務公司 international commercial port throughput; 高雄市輪船公司 city ferry system route splits; 新北市 順風航業 淡水↔八里 short ferry; 布澎藍色公路 seasonal Penghu service; 東琉線 小琉球 ferry; 臺北市公共運輸處 藍色水路 大稻埕河岸網) — [TIPC Open Data](https://www.twport.com.tw/) · [data.gov.tw dataset 8366](https://data.gov.tw/dataset/8366) · [data.gov.tw dataset 8116](https://data.gov.tw/dataset/8116) · 臺北市公共運輸處 藍色水路統計表 - _Military installation demand remains a future expansion item pending a public MND garrison roster._ ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-tw-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
